Title: The Island of Thule, 1937
Short Description: Play the Iron Sentinel, Pulsar, Marksman, Kee Master, The Vigilant, Memnoch, and Kid Phantasm in a mission to investigate the island of Thule before the Nazis in this Basic Marvel Super Hero game.
Long Description: After the heroes saved President Roosevelt from the 5th Column menace, Col. Ward asks the collected heroes to access a newly formed island in the North Atlantic that the Nazis have called Thule. Players will play pre-generated heroes in this adventure. Role-Playing and Combat will be highlighted.
Experience Required: None (You've never played before - rules will be taught)
Attendee Registration?: Yes, they can register for this round without having played in any other events

Title: Demo Night & Social Mixer
Short Description: A chance to demo games & meet w/some of your favorite TRD exhibitors and presenters. Part demo, part networking, part social; join us for this culminating TRD event! A great way to end your Trade Day.
Experience Required: None (You've never played before - rules will be taught)

Title: 5th Column Strikes Washington D.C., 1937
Short Description: Play the Iron Sentinel, Pulsar, Marksman, Kee Master, The Vigilant, Memnoch, and Kid Phantasm in a mission to protect Washington, D.C. in this Basic Marvel Super Hero game based in 1937 America.
Long Description: After an unidentified blue light that waves across the globe changes the world, heroes and villains emerge. Colonel Ward has collected a team of new vigilantes to stop a menace to America from a 5th column unit in Washington, D.C. Players will play pre-generated heroes in this adventure. Role-Playing and Combat will be highlighted.
Experience Required: None (You've never played before - rules will be taught)
Attendee Registration?: Yes, they can register for this round without having played in any other events

Title: Iacon in-person championship
Short Description: AUTOBOTS sleeve up, and ROLL OUT! Transformers are not dead, as long as we fight! This is a full constructed Swiss style, tcg tournament, using the official Wizards of the Coast rules and ban list.
Long Description: This event will consist of swiss pairings then a cut to top 4. Decks must contain a minimum of 40 cards and no more than 3 of each named card. Teams are to be 25 stars between bots, and star cards in the deck and only include a single bot of a complete name. The three banned cards are Multi-Mission Gear, Press The Advantage, and Swap Parts. Total prizes will be based on participation and will be displayed at the event. This brings it all together, this weeks qualifiers to crown a champion!
Experience Required: Some (You've played it a bit and understand the basics)
Attendee Registration?: Yes, they can register for this round without having played in any other events

Title: Tunnel Trouble
Short Description: When bad luck plaguing railroaders tunneling through a mountain turns out to be nefarious and turns to murder, the team boss and associates must fix the problem. But at what cost?
Long Description: Collapses, fires, accidents, and dynamite explosions have plagued the Western Pacific Railroad Company tunnel team from the start as they attempt to put a rail tunnel through Grey's Peak. But now an obvious murder and a written warning show that all these things were not bad luck, but the actions of some nefarious group. Who is trying to stop the tunnel, and why? Many members of the tunneling team have now fled, but the hard-nosed boss and some remaining diehards decide to go after the ne'er-do-wells behind the mayhem. However, they might find more than they bargained for. Join in the adventure to find out!
Experience Required: None (You've never played before - rules will be taught)
Attendee Registration?: Yes, they can register for this round without having played in any other events

Title: Yaujta Predators, Massacure
Short Description: Play as a Band of Yautja Predators, a bounty has been placed on a Predator Bad Blood group. Find and Stop them.
Long Description: The fearsome predators of legend return. The Warp Dancer clan has been instructed by the elders of Yaujta Prime to seek out rogue Yautja, known as Bad Bloods. This is a task of great honor, and great danger, as these are fellow hunters, with nothing to lose. With three Bad Bloods on the run, the Warp Dancers have tracked them to a desolate red planet in the Copernican System. They have taken root in a human made habitation zone, and may even be working with the humans. Trading our sacred technology in exchange for sanctuary. Such taboos cannot be allowed.
Experience Required: None (You've never played before - rules will be taught)
Attendee Registration?: Yes, they can register for this round without having played in any other events

Title: Power Rangers: Ancient Forces Ep2
Short Description: A group of Power Rangers must unite together to face the Mechanorgs, and the pressures of High School marching band.
Long Description: In the midst of a High School marching band competition, a band of Power Rangers must stealthily hide the fact that several of the dreaded Mechanorgs have infiltrated the school, and perhaps even some of the students. Using teenage intuition, and the power of the Ancient Force on their side, they must root out the evil and defeat it before it turns this Musical Melody into a Sour Note.

Title: Laying on the Smack!
Short Description: A Professional Wrestling show gets crazy as a backstage fight gets brought out into the ring with some otherworldly guests. Who will be the last man standing?
Long Description: In the last few years, the Professional Wrestling show Total Party Knockout (Or TPK as it is often called.) Has risen in popularity, especially in Japan. They finally sold out a Major Arena for their fight, and they wanna make it the biggest one yet! Their biggest named stars, a special effects budget through the roof, and plenty of roughhousing for everyone!
